title: Review: fix: variable expansion in tests, doc cleanup
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — all P0/P1 issues from prior review are resolved. One new P2 type mismatch in SieveErrorKind, one P4 cosmetic. No correctness bugs found.
Confidence: 20% chance of missed bug. The variable expansion fix was the main correctness gap. Remaining uncertainty: address parsing edge cases (quoted display names, comments in RFC 5322 addresses), size test u64→usize truncation on 32-bit (theoretical). Would raise confidence: dovecot pigeonhole test suite.
